title: SecurePlanningFramework Blueprint
description: Enforceable security blueprint produced by the Secure Planning Framework (SPF v2.0). Every field marked required MUST be present. Use output_example.json for a populated reference.

feature_summary.description: Plain-language description of the feature or task being evaluated.

risk_classification.description: Overall risk level for this feature, derived from data sensitivity, privilege, and exposure surface.

data_sensitivity.description: Sensitive data elements involved (e.g. PII, credentials, financial, health, biometric).

actors.description: Actors interacting with the feature (e.g. User, Admin, System, Anonymous).

assumptions.description: Assumptions made during planning. Must be minimal and explicit — never inferred silently.

threat_model.description: Realistic threats derived from the activated rule packs. Must not be empty.

attack_vector.description: How the attack would be executed.

security_requirements.description: Enforceable security constraints derived from rule packs. Must not be empty.

rule_id.description: Exact rule ID from the source file, e.g. COM-001, OWASP-A01-001, API-005.

source.description: Source rule file path, e.g. common/common-considerations.md.

severity.description: Severity of this requirement, derived from the rule's severity field and escalation rules in meta/severity_map.json.

cwe.description: CWE IDs this requirement addresses, e.g. [CWE-89, CWE-79].

threat_ref.description: Reference to the threat_id in threat_model this requirement mitigates, e.g. T-01.

validation.description: Testable acceptance criterion for this requirement.

compliance_requirements.description: Compliance constraints. Empty array when no compliance packs are active (e.g. DPDPA disabled).

design_constraints.description: Strict design constraints or user-approved overrides (anti-patterns that were accepted with documented risk).

anti_patterns.description: Practices that MUST NOT appear in implementation.

required_controls.description: High-level security controls required (e.g. MFA, AES-256-GCM encryption, rate limiting).

acceptance_criteria.description: Testable criteria for feature security acceptance.
